Drain & Sewer

Drain Cleaning ➤

Professional-grade equipment clears stubborn clogs fast, preventing future blockages and keeping your drains flowing.

Sewer Line Repair ➤

Complete sewer line inspection, cleaning, and trenchless repair. We fix the problem without tearing up your yard.

Camera Inspection ➤

Video camera inspection pinpoints the exact location and cause of blockages so we fix it right the first time.

Water Systems

Water Heater Services ➤

Installation, repair, and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters. Reliable hot water guaranteed.

Leak Detection ➤

Advanced detection methods find hidden leaks fast — before they cause costly water damage to your home.

Water Filtration ➤

Whole-home water filtration systems that remove contaminants and improve the taste and quality of your water.

Fixtures & Pipes

Fixture Installation ➤

Professional faucet, sink, toilet, and shower installation done right the first time.

Pipe Repair ➤

From minor repairs to full repiping, we handle all pipe materials with precision and lasting results.

Gas Line Services ➤

Licensed gas line installation, repair, and leak detection for water heaters, stoves, fireplaces, and outdoor grills.

ABOUT US

Reliable Plumbing Services

Local Plumbers LLC was founded to provide a straightforward, full-service plumbing solution for homeowners in Calgary, AB. Avoid the hassle of sourcing and vetting multiple contractors — our team handles everything in-house, from diagnostics to repairs to installations and maintenance. Our result is a safe, well-maintained home with a team you can trust.
Get Free Quote →

WHY US

Our Personal Approach

With a vested interest in your entire property, our team treats your home like it's our own! In contrast to large companies focused on volume, we maintain a selective approach to both client onboarding and professional hiring. Our meticulous standard and personalized team culture allows our lead plumbers to sustain long-term trusted relationships with homeowners on a first name basis.
Get Free Quote →

THE PROCESS

Our Simple 3 Step Process

1

Contact Us

Start by calling us or completing the 'Get Free Quote' form below to share your plumbing needs with us.

2

Schedule Your Estimate

Next, we'll schedule an in-person property walkthrough at your convenience.

3

Get The Job Done

Confirm a scheduled date to complete the scope of work. Our meticulous team will exceed your expectations!

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer emergency plumbing service?

Yes. We provide 24/7 emergency plumbing service for burst pipes, major leaks, sewer backups, and other urgent issues.

Are your plumbers licensed?

All of our plumbers are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection.

Do you provide free estimates?

Yes, we offer free estimates for all plumbing projects. No surprises, no hidden fees.

What areas do you serve?

We serve the greater metro area and surrounding communities. Contact us to confirm service in your area.
